name: Doodle God: Fantasy World of Magic
author: Poki
description: Doodle God: Fantasy World of Magic is a simulation game where you combine components to create various magical objects, dark sorcerers, powerful dragons, and many more fantastical elements. Can you help human civilization in forming their unique culture with epic myths and legends? How to play: Combine elements in different combinations to make new discoveries! Select / Use - Left mouse button About the creator: Doodle God: Rocket Scientist is created by JoyBits. Check out their other games Don't Spoil It , Doodle God and Doodle God: Good Old Times on Poki!
